case_title: BOONNAUH CHANTHARENGSY VS. JIENG CHANTHAVONG et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-26-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE A CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT PRIOR TO THE CASE MANAGEMENT. THE DEC-26-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE COMPLAINT.
